{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-03-14.
8,120 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-13 -> 2026-03-14)

- "Which news network will be reported in March 2026 as the one whose first on-air face has died at age 73?"
  Your prediction distribution: {CNN: 0.30, Fox News: 0.10, MSNBC: 0.08} | Truth: Al Jazeera

- "Which constructor's two drivers will both fail to start the Formula One Chinese Grand Prix on 15 March 2026?"

- "By March 15, 2026, which NGO will be reported as carrying out three Mediterranean rescue operations and taking 123 survivors aboard?"
  Your prediction distribution: {SOS Mediterranee: 0.20, Sea-Watch: 0.15, Medecins Sans Frontieres: 0.12, Open Arms: 0.10} | Truth: Emergency
  Brier: -0.09 | TW-Score: -8.69
- "Which country will state by March 16, 2026 that it will not participate, “not even in any effort to keep the Strait of Hormuz open by military means”?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Iran: 0.20, Russia: 0.12, Israel: 0.08} | Truth: Germany
  Brier: -0.06 | TW-Score: -6.08

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 298 (276 resolved, 54 active)
- accuracy: 16.1% | brier skill score: 0.062 | time weighted score: 1801.83
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
